summary: HealthBridge Vault v2 expansion fully validated. 20/20 backend pytest cases pass on the public preview URL covering password forgot/reset, profile PATCH, change-password (200 + 400 path), push token register, /metrics/ingest, Stripe dev-fallback checkout + billing portal, and the entire /api/admin/* surface (stats, users search, plan toggle, immediate cancel, broadcast, audit). Frontend smoke-tested on mobile viewport (390x844): Forgot screen → token auto-fill → reset → redirect; demo Settings shows PRO card and Subscribe → flips to PRO with manage-sub-btn; /admin gated correctly (demo redirects to /(tabs), admin sees full portal with 6 KPI tiles, Users search, Broadcast send, Audit list). Audit screen confirms the 'TEST broadcast' and 'Welcome to HealthBridge PRO ✨' push notifications were persisted.

issues: `props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents` warning still present (pre-existing from v1 — LinearGradient overlays). Non-blocking.

react_native_issues.issue: `Listening to push token changes is not yet fully supported on web` — expected per spec, push delivery is MOCKED on web/Expo Go.

action_items: Optional cleanup: migrate `pointerEvents="none"` to `style={{ pointerEvents: 'none' }}` (carried over from v1).

Reminder: Stripe checkout/portal currently take the dev_mode fallback because env key is `sk_test_emergent` placeholder — this is intentional. Swap STRIPE_API_KEY to a real test key to exercise Stripe Checkout for real.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 812 lines and approaching the 700-line split threshold; consider splitting Stripe / Admin / Auth into routers for maintainability.

`/api/auth/password/reset` correctly handles tz-naive `expires_at` (lines 437-441) — historical 500 in backend.err.log was from a previous reload and is no longer reproducible (test_reset_with_token_changes_password PASSED).
`current_user` reads via 401 then `decode_token` raises HTTPException — pattern is correct; no _id leaks across endpoints.
`admin_only` dependency layered on top of `current_user` is clean; non-admin gets 403 as verified.
`@app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown')` still deprecated in FastAPI; consider migrating to lifespan.
Push broadcast iterates users sequentially — fine for the seed scale (<100) but for production switch to a job queue + batched Expo push requests.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on all v2 critical flows (forgot/reset, PRO upgrade, admin gating, all 4 admin tabs)

seed_data_creation: Admin user auto-seeded by backend startup (admin@healthbridge.app / Admin1234! with is_admin=true and PRO sub). Tests additionally create disposable users prefixed `reset_`, `chg_`, `bill_`, `np_`, `ad_` for isolated assertions; demo seed untouched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: BASE_URL=https://cross-health-sync.preview.emergentagent.com. v2 endpoints all live. For frontend flows on web preview: token auto-fills in forgot screen after submit (no copy/paste needed). /admin route is at top-level (not nested under (tabs)). Stripe is dev_mode — `subscribe-btn` immediately flips the user to PRO and shows `manage-sub-btn` after a /me refresh on next settings mount.
rca_of_issue: No outstanding bugs. The 500 logged in backend.err.log on `/api/auth/password/reset` was pre-fix (offset-naive vs offset-aware datetime comparison); current code already handles the case and pytest's reset flow is green.
